title: Excorrelation Book
body:
Mod that adds an uncraftable guidebook for excorrelation.

It's literally just a guidebook for excorrelation so the mod is easier to setup and understand what each item does without needing Google.

Obviously requires [Excorrelation](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/excorrelation) and [Patchouli](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/patchouli).
